'''Korda Six''' was a planet that ranged from barren rocky plains to small forests in which the [[Kordan|natives]] lived. It was also where [[Montross (bounty hunter)|Montross]] [[Battle of Korda Six|betrayed]] [[Jaster Mereel]] to the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]]. Jaster was killed by [[Tor Vizsla]], and [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] became the [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]].
